description_long: This object is a precision bolt-action sniper rifle, featuring a long, slender barrel and an olive-green chassis with a thumbhole stock. The rifle is equipped with a large telescopic scope mounted on top, designed for long-range accuracy. The stock is fixed and includes an adjustable cheek rest and a thick rubber buttpad for recoil absorption. The forend has a bipod attachment for stability during prone shooting, and the magazine is a detachable box type, partially visible beneath the receiver. The barrel is free-floating and ends with a small muzzle brake or thread protector. The overall design is robust, with a combination of metal and polymer materials, making it suitable for tactical and precision shooting scenarios.
description: A bolt-action sniper rifle with an olive-green thumbhole stock, long barrel, and mounted telescopic scope. Features include a detachable box magazine, bipod, and a robust, precision-oriented design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel, scope, and stock, with the muzzle device and bipod legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the olive-green stock, mounted scope, bipod, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttpad, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thumbhole stock, scope, and the magazine well, with details of the bolt and trigger area.
